Ebook.title: Ebook
Ebook.description: An ebook with its settings and access code

title.description: The title of the ebook or landing page

description.description: The description text for the landing page

heroImage.description: The URL of the hero image

ctaText.description: The text for the call to action button

accessCode.description: The code required to access this ebook

EbookPage.title: EbookPage
EbookPage.description: A single page in the ebook

pageNumber.description: The sequential number of the page

images.description: Array of image URLs for this page

text.description: Optional text content for the page
